original_snippet_context: Report on legislative actions in the Brazilian Chamber of Deputies.
relevant_quote: A Camara dos Deputados enviou hontem ao Senado o projecto creando uma Caixa de Conversão.
justification: This is a purely informational report on the Chamber of Deputies sending a project to the Senate about creating a "Caixa de Conversão," without expressing any opinion or stance on the specifics.
